nodes.label: Firebase Firestore & Auth Configuration
nodes.rationale: Offline persistence is explicitly disabled and long polling is forced to maintain server-side authority and prevent issues with specific browsers like Opera GX that may mismanage local storage/offline states.

nodes.label: User Profile Model
nodes.rationale: Acts as the central aggregate root for all user data, including lifting statistics, program-specific state (Pencilneck, Super Mutant, etc.), and earned badges.

nodes.label: Protected Layout Component
nodes.rationale: Implements a dynamic theming engine that switches the entire application's visual context (colors, logos, shimmer effects) based on the user's active workout program ID.

nodes.label: Trinary Conjugate Program
nodes.rationale: A conjugate periodization program focusing on rotating variations based on identified weak points (off-chest, mid-range, lockout) for primary compound lifts.

nodes.label: Super Mutant Hypertrophy Program
nodes.rationale: Features a complex rolling 7-day volume tracking system and muscle group alternation blocks (A/B/C/D) to manage fatigue and stimulus across 12 muscle groups.

nodes.label: Pain & Glory Program
nodes.rationale: Integrates E2MOM (Every 2 Minutes on the Minute) adjustments and deficit snatch grip deadlift variations for high-intensity strength training.

nodes.label: Badge & Achievement System
nodes.rationale: Provides a gamified progression layer where lifting milestones (e.g., '50 Tonne Club') and attendance streaks unlock visual rewards and special quotes.

nodes.label: Multilingual Translation System
nodes.rationale: Supports English and Polish localization across the entire application using a context-based provider and i18n hook.

nodes.label: Weak Point Selection Modal
nodes.rationale: Diagnostic tool within the Trinary program that allows users to identify their biomechanical sticking points to automatically drive exercise variation selection.

nodes.label: Core Button UI Component
nodes.rationale: Standardized button component utilizing Class Variance Authority (CVA) for theme-consistent variants (destructive, outline, etc.).

nodes.label: Trinary (Conjugate Periodization)
nodes.rationale: Powerlifting program using conjugate periodization with ME/DE/RE rotation and weak-point based exercise selection.

nodes.label: Bench Domination
nodes.rationale: Modular bench press program with complex 1RM calculations, reactive deloads, and sustainable progression.

nodes.label: Pain & Glory
nodes.rationale: 16-week intermediate deadlift specialization program with EMOM phases and peaking logic.

nodes.label: Peachy Glute Plan
nodes.rationale: Specialized glute development program with theme triggers and finisher injection logic.

nodes.label: Pencilneck Eradication
nodes.rationale: Hypertrophy-focused program with heavy phase logic and intensity techniques.

nodes.label: Skeleton to Threat
nodes.rationale: 12-week structure focused on forced progression and muscle gain.

nodes.label: Epley Formula
nodes.rationale: Used to calculate estimated 1RM (e1RM) from AMRAP sets to drive weight progression: weight * (1 + reps/30).

nodes.label: Reactive Deload
nodes.rationale: Automatic adjustment mechanism that triggers a -15% weight reduction and volume cut if performance drops (e.g., 2 consecutive AMRAPs <= 7 reps).

nodes.label: Weak Point System
nodes.rationale: Dynamic exercise variation selection based on user-identified weak points in main lifts (e.g., off-chest vs lockout).

nodes.label: AMRAP (As Many Reps As Possible)
nodes.rationale: Performance monitoring sets used to trigger weight increases and e1RM recalculations.

nodes.label: Pullup W13 UI Polish
nodes.rationale: Documentation for UI refinements and logic updates for weighted pullups in week 13.

nodes.label: Acolyte of Strength Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual representation for the 'Acolyte of Strength' achievement, awarded for completing the first 16-week cycle of the Trinary program.

nodes.label: Behemoth of the Wastes Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual reward for the 'Behemoth of the Wastes' achievement, requiring completion of all 84 workouts (14 weeks) in the Super Mutant program plus a new PR.
nodes.norm_label: behemoth of the wastes badge image

nodes.label: 20kg Bench Jump Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual representation for gaining 20kg or more on the bench press within a single program run.

nodes.label: 30kg Bench Jump Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual representation for gaining 30kg or more on the bench press within a single program run.

nodes.label: Bench Psychopath Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon for completing Bench Domination, peaking, and setting a new PR.

nodes.label: Certified Shoulder Boulder Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual reward for completing the 'Pencilneck Eradication Protocol' program.

nodes.label: Cannonball Delts Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Meta-badge awarded for earning both the 'Rear-Delt Reaper' and '3D Delts' achievements.

nodes.label: Deficit Demon Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual reward for increasing the Deficit Snatch Grip Deadlift by 30kg or more during the first 8 weeks of Pain & Glory.

nodes.label: Deload Denier Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual representation of the achievement for never triggering a reactive deload during a program.

nodes.label: Disciple of Pain Badge Image
nodes.rationale: Visual reward for completing the 'ramp-in' phase (Weeks 1-4) of the Trinary program.
